header.title: A New Chapter Awaits
header.subtitle: Mokua's Voice — Stories that Linger Beyond the Page

content.mainText: Every great tale begins in silence before the world hears its echo. Mokua's platform is almost here — a place where prose breathes, poetry resonates, and every word feels like a heartbeat.
highlights: Be part of the first readers to witness the unveiling.
Reserve your front-row seat to stories that will outlive the season.

form.successMessage: Thank you for stepping into the story early — you'll be the first to know when we go live.
form.errorMessage: We missed a page. Please try again.
